Legal.templateDisclaimer: This document is a template draft pending legal review. Contact us with questions.

privacy.metaDescription: How ORKI collects, stores, and uses your personal data. KSA PDPL and GDPR aligned.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy

section1.heading: Who we are
section1.body: ORKI is the data controller for personal data processed through this site, operated under [USER-CONFIRM commercial registration]. For questions about this policy, email us at privacy@orki.sa.

section2.heading: What personal data we collect
section2.body: Cart contents (anonymous, linked to the orki_sid cookie). At checkout: name, email, phone, and shipping address. Admin authentication credentials (Supabase). No browsing tracking beyond cookieless Vercel Analytics page-view counts.

section3.heading: Why we collect it
section3.body: We collect data only for the purposes listed below: processing your orders, delivering products to you, communicating with you about those orders, and running secure admin operations. We do not profile users or sell personal data.

section4.heading: How we collect it
section4.body: Directly from you when you fill the checkout form, write to us, or sign in to admin tools. Automatically via the orki_sid cart cookie when you browse the catalog and add items to your cart.

section5.heading: How we store it
section5.body: Order, customer, and cart data is stored in Supabase Postgres in the [USER-CONFIRM] region. The site is served from Vercel's edge network. Database backups are encrypted at rest.

section6.heading: How we process and use it
section6.body: Lawful basis: contract performance (PDPL Art. 6 / GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)) for order processing, and legitimate interest (PDPL Art. 6 / GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)) for fraud prevention and admin operations. We never use your data for advertising.

section7.heading: Who we share it with
section7.body: Vercel (hosting and CDN), Supabase (database), our payment processor (currently a mock; the real processor will be named here when introduced), and shipping carriers used to deliver your order. Each operates under its own data-protection terms.

section8.heading: International transfers
section8.body: Supabase may store data in a [USER-CONFIRM] region outside KSA. Where applicable, such transfers comply with PDPL Art. 29 and GDPR Art. 44–49 through standard contractual clauses or equivalent safeguards.

section9.heading: How long we keep it
section9.body: Cart cookie: 30 days. Order records: [USER-CONFIRM] 5 years (KSA tax retention requirement). Email correspondence: [USER-CONFIRM] 18 months. Admin audit logs: 12 months. Data is deleted or anonymized after these periods.

section10.heading: How we destroy it
section10.body: When retention expires we delete the database row and write an audit-log entry recording the deletion. Encrypted backups roll off on the standard backup-retention schedule.

section11.heading: Your rights
section11.body: Under KSA PDPL and GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and to object to processing. You may also withdraw consent where processing is based on consent.

section12.heading: How to exercise your rights
section12.body: Email privacy@orki.sa with the subject line "Data Request" and tell us which right you want to exercise. We will verify your identity and respond within 30 days as required by PDPL Art. 11. No fee is charged for routine requests.

section13.heading: Cookies
section13.body: We use only strictly-necessary cookies. See the Cookie Policy at /legal/cookies for the full list, durations, and our position on analytics and marketing cookies.

section14.heading: Children's privacy
section14.body: This service is intended for users 18 years or older. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you believe a minor has provided personal data to us, contact privacy@orki.sa and we will delete it.

section15.heading: Changes to this policy
section15.body: We may update this policy. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the current version. Material changes will be communicated by email when we hold a verified address on file for you.

section16.heading: Contact us
section16.body: ORKI, [USER-CONFIRM postal address, Riyadh, KSA]. Privacy enquiries: privacy@orki.sa. We respond within 30 days.

terms.metaDescription: ORKI's terms of sale: pricing, payment, shipping, returns, and dispute resolution.
terms.heading: Terms & Conditions

section1.heading: Acceptance of terms
section1.body: By accessing this site or placing an order, you agree to these Terms & Conditions and to our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

section2.heading: About ORKI
section2.body: ORKI is a Saudi streetwear brand operated under [USER-CONFIRM commercial registration]. The site at orki.sa is owned and operated by ORKI.

section3.heading: Eligibility
section3.body: You must be 18 years or older and legally capable of entering into a binding contract under KSA law to place an order. Orders placed by minors are void.

section4.heading: Account and orders
section4.body: An order is confirmed once you receive an order confirmation email. We reserve the right to decline or cancel orders for any reason, including stock outages, suspected fraud, or pricing errors.

section5.heading: Pricing and currency
section5.body: All prices are displayed in Saudi Riyals (SAR) and include 15% VAT as required by KSA tax law. Prices may change without notice; the price applicable to your order is the one displayed at checkout.

section6.heading: Payment
section6.body: We accept Mada, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, and Cash on Delivery. Online card payments are processed by our payment processor; we never store full card numbers on our servers.

section7.heading: Shipping
section7.body: Shipping fee is a flat 25 SAR within KSA, free on orders over 300 SAR. Delivery times depend on the carrier and destination city. Risk of loss passes to you on delivery.

section8.heading: Returns and refunds
section8.body: You may return unworn items in their original condition with tags attached within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 14 days of our receipt and inspection of the returned items.

section9.heading: Order cancellation
section9.body: You may cancel an order before it ships by contacting us. Once an order has shipped, the standard 14-day returns process applies.

section10.heading: Liability
section10.body: To the maximum extent permitted by KSA law, ORKI's total liability for any single order is limited to the amount you paid for that order. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential losses.

section11.heading: Intellectual property
section11.body: All site content — designs, photography, logos, text, and source code — is the intellectual property of ORKI or its licensors. You may not copy, redistribute, or commercially exploit them without prior written consent.

section12.heading: Prohibited uses
section12.body: You may not use this site to commit fraud, scrape data at scale, attempt to breach security controls, or place orders with the intent to disrupt the business or other customers.

section13.heading: Privacy
section13.body: Our handling of your personal data is governed by the Privacy Policy available at /legal/privacy.

section14.heading: Governing law and dispute resolution
section14.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these Terms is subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent KSA courts.

section15.heading: Changes to these terms
section15.body: We may amend these Terms at any time. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the current version. Continued use of the site after changes are posted means you accept the revised Terms.

section16.heading: Contact us
section16.body: Questions about these Terms: privacy@orki.sa. ORKI, [USER-CONFIRM postal address, Riyadh, KSA].

cookies.metaDescription: Cookies ORKI uses to run the cart and checkout. No analytics or marketing cookies are set.
cookies.heading: Cookie Policy

section1.heading: What are cookies
section1.body: Cookies are small text files a website stores in your browser so it can remember information between visits. Some cookies are strictly necessary to make the site function (cart, login). Others — for analytics or advertising — are optional and require consent.

section2.heading: Cookies we use
section2.body: ORKI sets only two cookies, both strictly necessary. orki_sid keeps your cart contents linked to your browser for up to 30 days; sb-* keeps admin users signed in for the duration of their session.

section3.heading: We do not use
section3.body: ORKI sets no analytics cookies, no marketing cookies, and no third-party trackers. We do not use Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, or any advertising tag on this site.

section4.heading: Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights
section4.body: We use Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights to count anonymous page views and measure site speed. These services rely on cookieless beacons — no identifying cookie is stored — and they qualify under the PDPL strictly-necessary exemption for service operation.

section5.heading: Your choices
section5.body: You can clear or block cookies in your browser settings. Blocking the orki_sid cookie will prevent the cart from working; blocking sb-* will prevent admin sign-in. Browsing the catalog without using the cart works without any cookie.

section6.heading: Changes to this policy
section6.body: We may update this policy if the cookies we set change. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the current version. Adding any non-strictly-necessary cookie would require a separate consent banner first.

section7.heading: Contact us
section7.body: Questions about cookies on this site: privacy@orki.sa.
